debug_info.goal:
case succ
α : Type
inst✝² : DecidableEq α
inst✝¹ : SampleableType α
inst✝ : OracleSpec.DecidableEq (MerkleTree.spec α)
n : ℕ
ih :
  ∀ (leaves : List.Vector α (2 ^ n)) (preexisting_cache : QueryCache (MerkleTree.spec α)),
    HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail
      (((fun {α_1} x => (simulateQ randomOracle).toFun α_1 x) (MerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α n leaves)).run
        preexisting_cache)
leaves : List.Vector α (2 ^ (n + 1))
preexisting_cache : QueryCache (MerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail
    (((fun {α_1} x => (simulateQ randomOracle).toFun α_1 x) (MerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α (n + 1) leaves)).run
      preexisting_cache)
